location: A 2% drop from axe-wielding Ancestral Follower Warriors. Several spawn just northwest of the Worshippers' Woods grace in Siofra River, the easiest early access point.
tactics: Descend to Siofra River via the Siofra River Well in Limgrave's Mistwood (or the Fringefolk Hero's Grave), then head to the Worshippers' Woods grace — several axe-wielding Ancestral Followers patrol just northwest of it
Ancestral Followers on the surrounding cliffs snipe with bows from range, so clear or break their line of sight before farming the axe-wielders on the ground
Ancestral Follower Warriors carry a mix of weapons (axes, hammers, etc.), so confirm which one is swinging an axe before committing to the fight
lore: An axe carved from the skull of some great herbivore, wielded by ancestral followers who spurn metal — its molar-lined edge crushes and tears rather than cuts cleanly.

builds.name: Strength strike-damage pick
builds.why: The only axe in the base game dealing Strike damage instead of Standard, giving Strength builds an edge against skeletons and heavily armored foes that resist slashing.

builds.name: Heavy-infused Strength bruiser
builds.why: High base Strength scaling (D, improved further under Heavy affinity) suits a dedicated two-handed Strength build.
